title: Follicular dendritic cell sarcoma of the parotid gland: A case report.
author_string: An, Pugen, Li, Yizhou, Zhao, Jizhi
abstract: Follicular dendritic cell sarcoma (FDCS) is an exceedingly rare malignant neoplasm. The management of this tumor is fully challenging due to its rarity and lack of documentations. We share a case with primary parotid FDCS. This case report depicts the clinicopathological features of FDCS, which intends to serve as a reference to clinicians in its correct identification.
